response.justification: The candidate is an experienced, versatile senior developer with strong web/full-stack and some low-latency systems background, but is a poor match for this specific role. The position requires 8 years of C++ and deep large-scale cloud/compute infrastructure experience; the resume shows only ~7 months of professional C++ (National Instruments) plus a thesis project, and most career history is web/product development in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang. There is no evidence of formal technical leadership of platform teams at the scale this role demands.
strengths: Low-latency, high-throughput systems work in DLang at Sociomantic (millions of requests/sec)
Broad, long-tenured engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and DevOps tooling
Strong mentoring/knowledge-sharing record via workshops, courses, and open-source projects
concerns: Far short of the 8-year C++ requirement (roughly under 1 year professional C++)
Limited large-scale cloud compute platform or distributed infrastructure architecture experience
No formal technical-leadership role managing cross-team priorities, deadlines, and deliverables
